candidate_llm_application: LLM model provenance via fingerprint spectrum: each fine-tuned variant carries die-link-like activation signatures; allocation distinguishes provenance by spectrum.

results.title: Model Fingerprinting / Provenance Attribution: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on model fingerprinting / provenance attribution, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
